title: Module 1: Winter Weather Hazard Recognition
description: Identify and respond to winter weather hazards including black ice fog freezing rain and snow squalls on interstate corridors

title: Module 2: Chain-Up Procedures and Requirements
description: Demonstrate knowledge of state-specific chain requirements and proper chain-up procedures for Class 8 vehicles

title: Module 3: Emergency Response - Winter Incidents
description: Proper emergency response procedures for winter driving incidents including jackknife recovery and stranded vehicle protocol

title: Final Assessment: Winter Driving Safety
description: Comprehensive assessment covering all winter driving safety modules. Minimum 80% required for certification.

title: HOS Rules Review and Quiz
description: Review current HOS regulations and complete knowledge check quiz

title: ELD Operation Scenarios
description: Complete 5 ELD operation scenarios including proper logging of on-duty off-duty sleeper and driving time

title: Corridor Hazard Identification Exercise
description: Identify hazards for assigned corridor using route maps and historical incident data

title: Defensive Driving Simulation Report
description: Complete online simulation and submit written report on defensive driving decisions

title: Tablet Setup and Troubleshooting Lab
description: Hands-on exercise covering tablet power-on sequence ELD pairing and common troubleshooting steps

title: Firmware Update Procedure Walkthrough
description: Step-by-step walkthrough of firmware update process including pre-update backup and post-update verification

title: Pre-Trip Inspection Practical
description: Complete documented pre-trip inspection using standard checklist

title: Hazmat Placarding Recognition Quiz
description: Identify hazmat placards and describe appropriate response actions
